parameters.query: SELECT workflow_name, COUNT(*) as runs, AVG(CASE WHEN success THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) as success_rate, AVG(duration_ms) as avg_duration, SUM(items_processed) as total_items, MAX(created_at) as last_run FROM workflow_executions WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY workflow_name ORDER BY runs DESC

SELECT event_name, COUNT(*) as count, AVG((properties->>'value')::float) as avg_value FROM analytics_events WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY event_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "max_tokens": 3000, "system": "You are the performance analyst for an autonomous AI business system. Analyze data and output ONLY valid JSON with specific, actionable improvement recommendations.", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Analyze this week's performance data and identify improvements.

Data:
" + JSON.stringify($json) + "

Output JSON only:
{
  "weekly_summary": "2-3 sentence executive summary",
  "key_wins": ["win1", "win2"],
  "key_failures": ["failure1", "failure2"],
  "root_causes": ["cause1", "cause2"],
  "improvements": [{"workflow": string, "problem": string, "fix": string, "expected_impact": string}],
  "experiments": [{"hypothesis": string, "test": string, "metric": string}],
  "claude_md_updates": ["new rule or tip to add"],
  "priority_next_week": ["task1", "task2", "task3"]
}" }] } }}

={{ { "title": "Weekly Reflection — " + $('Build Performance Summary').item.json.week_ending, "content": "## Summary
" + $json.weekly_summary + "

## Wins
" + $json.key_wins.map(w => '- ' + w).join('
') + "

## Issues
" + $json.key_failures.map(f => '- ' + f).join('
') + "

## Improvements Queued
" + $json.improvements.map(i => '- ' + i.workflow + ': ' + i.fix).join('
') + "

## Next Week
" + $json.priority_next_week.map((t,i) => (i+1)+'. '+t).join('
') } }}

={{ { "embeds": [{ "title": "📊 Weekly Business Report — " + $('Build Performance Summary').item.json.week_ending, "color": 5814783, "description": $json.weekly_summary, "fields": [{ "name": "✅ Wins", "value": $json.key_wins.slice(0,3).join('
') || 'None logged', "inline": true }, { "name": "🔧 Improvements Queued", "value": $json.improvements.slice(0,3).map(i => i.workflow).join('
') || 'None', "inline": true }, { "name": "🎯 This Week Priority", "value": $json.priority_next_week.slice(0,3).map((t,i) => (i+1)+'. '+t).join('
') }] }] } }}
